mentions.note: Stock stuck in tight range; successor announcement to CEO Bob Iger could break logjam and provide catalyst.
Stuck in linear TV purgatory; strategic acquisition of Norwegian Cruise would transform into vacation/lifestyle company; CEO D'Arreo has cruise expertise; unlocks significant value.
Disney cruises within conglomerate; very tough stock to own; limited upside from cruise segment.
Travel/consumer discretionary; levered to consumer strength not just gasoline prices; up from $92 to $106 in rally, barely down today despite oil spike.
Microcosm of higher-end travel market; strong consumer holding should yield good quarter. Fresh start under new CEO Josh Silverman.
